recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Of Human Bondage
recommendations.overview: A young man finds himself attracted to a cold and unfeeling waitress who may ultimately destroy them both.

recommendations.title: Dear Santa
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Romance, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

recommendations.title: Edward Scissorhands
recommendations.overview: A small suburban town receives a visit from a castaway unfinished science experiment named Edward.

recommendations.title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle
recommendations.overview: A suburban family chooses seemingly sweet Peyton Flanders as their newborn's nanny. Only much later does the infant's mother, Claire Bartel, realize Peyton's true intentions -- to destroy Claire and replace her in the family. The nail-biting suspense

recommendations.title: Unfaithful
recommendations.overview: A New York suburban couple's marriage goes dangerously awry when the wife indulges in an adulterous fling.

recommendations.title: The Myth of the American Sleepover
recommendations.overview: Four young people navigate the suburban wonderland of metro-Detroit looking for love and adventure on the last weekend of summer.

recommendations.title: Broken
recommendations.overview: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: She-Devil
recommendations.overview: A cunning and resourceful housewife vows revenge on her husband when he begins an affair with a wealthy romance novelist.
